name: Carol's Lasagne
recipeIngredient: 300 g Lasagne noodles (use enough noodles to cover a 33x22 baking pan 6 layers deep)
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the meat and drain off any excess fat. Heat the onions, stirring in the remaining sauce ingredients until just simmering for about 30 minutes.
2. Fill a very large pot with water and add 5 ml of salt per liter of water. Add the lasagne noodles and cook until they are fully done (enough to cover a 33x22 baking pan 6 layers deep). Preheat oven to 150°C.
3. Grease the inside of the baking pan lightly with vegetable oil. Make three filling layers: place 1/3 of the noodles in two layers, then spread 1/3 of the ricotta mixture, sprinkle 1/3 of the mozzarella cheese, and top with 1/3 of the sauce.
4. Bake uncovered for 40-45 minutes or until bubbly hot. Let cool for 5-10 minutes before serving.
